ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's delivery address */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who referred this user */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* User's loyalty points */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the restaurant's logo */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "delivery_fee" TEXT /* Delivery fee charged by the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the restaurant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the restaurant was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the restaurant is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the menu item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course, dessert) */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the menu item is vegetarian */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the menu item is a special item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the menu item is available */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the menu item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calorie count of the menu item */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens present in the menu item */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients used in the menu item */,
  "nutrition_info" TEXT /* Additional nutritional information about the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the order was placed with */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., ADDED_TO_WISHLIST, payment_done) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "delivery_fee" TEXT /* Delivery fee for the order */,
  "tip_amount" TEXT /* Tip amount added by the user */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated or actual delivery time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the order has been paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the menu item */,
  "customizations" TEXT /* Customizations requested by the user for the menu item */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the wishlist belongs to */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item in the wishlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments the user has for the menu item in their wishlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wishlist item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wishlist item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the payment is for */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, pending, failed) */,
  "card_last_4_digits" TEXT /* Last four digits of the payment card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of payment card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_details" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being delivered */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is to be delivered */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., pending, out_for_delivery, delivered) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., pickup, delivery) */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time */,
  "delivery_instructions" TEXT /* Special delivery instructions provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the delivery was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the feedback is for */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the feedback is about */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the restaurant to the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
